short_note: Caffeine blocks adenosine receptors; strongest evidence/perception match.
Often perceived strongly; evidence is mixed/moderate.
Morning habit/ritual value is mostly experiential.
Coffee is strongly perceived as a social pause.
Coffee contains polyphenols/chlorogenic acids; public awareness is lower.
Some evidence for metabolic associations, but not the main reason people drink it.
Umbrella reviews find many beneficial associations, but public perception is lower.
